case_title: LUXOR CAB COMPANY VS NICKAMP, BRIDGETT MARIE

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO BRIDGETT MARIE NICKAMP RETURNED--FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUXOR CAB COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NICKAMP, BRIDGETT MARIE $2,467.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,489.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-14-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-25-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR SERVICE.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF LUXOR CAB COMPANY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NICKAMP, BRIDGETT MARIE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LUXOR CAB COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT NICKAMP, BRIDGETT MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $500.00 FILED BY NICKAMP, BRIDGETT MARIE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NICKAMP, BRIDGETT MARIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
